description: Attack phrases for Layer C FAISS semantic index. Covers all 7 OWASP LLM Top 10 injection categories. v1.1 adds dense paraphrase variants per category to raise cosine similarity above 0.75 for all known attack patterns using all-MiniLM-L6-v2.
